commands.label: Model Path
commands.description: Model path to load

commands.label: Model URL
commands.description: Model download URL

commands.label: HuggingFace Repo
commands.description: HuggingFace model repo (user/model[:quant])

commands.label: HuggingFace File
commands.description: HuggingFace model file override

commands.label: HuggingFace Token
commands.description: HuggingFace access token

commands.label: Context Size
commands.description: Size of the prompt context (0 = from model)

commands.label: Max Tokens to Predict
commands.description: Number of tokens to predict (-1 = infinity)

commands.label: LoRA Adapter
commands.description: Path to LoRA adapter

commands.label: Multimodal Projector
commands.description: Path to multimodal projector file

commands.label: Control Vector
commands.description: add a control vector note: use comma-separated values to add multiple control vectors

commands.label: Control Vector Layer Range
commands.description: layer range to apply the control vector(s) to, start and end inclusive

commands.label: Control Vector Scaled
commands.description: add a control vector with user defined scaling SCALE note: use comma-separated values (format: FNAME:SCALE,...)

commands.label: Hf File V
commands.description: Hugging Face model file for the vocoder model

commands.label: Lora Init Without Apply
commands.description: load LoRA adapters without applying them (apply later via POST /lora-adapters)

commands.label: Lora Scaled
commands.description: path to LoRA adapter with user defined scaling (format: FNAME:SCALE,...) note: use comma-separated values

commands.label: Mmproj Auto
commands.description: whether to use multimodal projector file (if available), useful when using -hf

commands.label: Mmproj Offload
commands.description: whether to enable GPU offloading for multimodal projector

commands.label: Models Autoload
commands.description: for router server, whether to automatically load models

commands.label: Models Dir
commands.description: directory containing models for the router server

commands.label: Models Max
commands.description: for router server, maximum number of models to load simultaneously

commands.label: Models Preset
commands.description: path to INI file containing model presets for the router server

commands.label: Override Kv
commands.description: advanced option to override model metadata by key. to specify multiple overrides, either use comma-separated values. types: int, float, bool, str. example: --override-kv tokenizer.ggml.add_bos_token=bool:false,tokenizer.ggml.add_eos_token=bool:false

commands.label: CPU Threads
commands.description: Number of CPU threads for generation (-1 = auto)

commands.label: Batch Threads
commands.description: Threads for batch/prompt processing (default: same as --threads)

commands.label: Batch Size
commands.description: Logical maximum batch size

commands.label: Micro-Batch Size
commands.description: Physical maximum batch size

commands.label: Parallel Sequences
commands.description: Number of parallel sequences to decode

commands.label: Keep Tokens
commands.description: Tokens to keep from initial prompt (-1 = all)

commands.label: Memory Lock
commands.description: Force system to keep model in RAM (no swap)

commands.label: Memory Map
commands.description: Memory-map the model file (faster load)

commands.label: Flash Attention
commands.description: Flash Attention mode

commands.label: Full SWA Cache
commands.description: Use full-size SWA cache

commands.label: Check Tensors
commands.description: Check model tensor data for invalid values

commands.label: Process Priority
commands.description: Process/thread priority: low(-1), normal(0), medium(1), high(2), realtime(3)

commands.label: Poll Level
commands.description: Polling level to wait for work (0-100, 0 = no polling)

commands.label: NUMA Mode
commands.description: NUMA optimization type

commands.label: Adaptive Decay
commands.description: adaptive-p: decay rate for target adaptation over time. lower values are more reactive, higher values are more stable. (valid range 0.0 to 0.99)

commands.label: Adaptive Target
commands.description: adaptive-p: select tokens near this probability (valid range 0.0 to 1.0; negative = disabled)

commands.label: Cache Idle Slots
commands.description: save and clear idle slots on new task

commands.label: Cache Prompt
commands.description: whether to enable prompt caching

commands.label: Cache Ram
commands.description: set the maximum cache size in MiB

commands.label: Cache Reuse
commands.description: min chunk size to attempt reusing from the cache via KV shifting, requires prompt caching to be enabled [(card)](https://ggml.ai/f0.png)

commands.label: Checkpoint Every N Tokens
commands.description: create a checkpoint every n tokens during prefill (processing), -1 to disable

commands.label: Context Shift
commands.description: whether to use context shift on infinite text generation

commands.label: Cpu Strict
commands.description: use strict CPU placement

commands.label: Cpu Strict Batch
commands.description: use strict CPU placement

commands.label: Ctx Checkpoints
commands.description: max number of context checkpoints to create per slot

commands.label: Draft
commands.description: the argument has been removed. use --spec-draft-n-max or --spec-ngram-mod-n-max

commands.label: Draft Min
commands.description: the argument has been removed. use --spec-draft-n-min or --spec-ngram-mod-n-min

commands.label: Embd Gemma Default
commands.description: use default EmbeddingGemma model (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Embd Normalize
commands.description: normalisation for embeddings (-1=none, 0=max absolute int16, 1=taxicab, 2=euclidean, >2=p-norm)

commands.label: Embedding
commands.description: restrict to only support embedding use case; use only with dedicated embedding models

commands.label: Fim Qwen 1
commands.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 1.5B (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Fim Qwen 14b Spec
commands.description: use Qwen 2.5 Coder 14B + 0.5B draft for speculative decoding (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Fim Qwen 30b Default
commands.description: use default Qwen 3 Coder 30B A3B Instruct (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Fim Qwen 3b Default
commands.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Fim Qwen 7b Default
commands.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Fim Qwen 7b Spec
commands.description: use Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B + 0.5B draft for speculative decoding (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Gpt Oss 120b Default
commands.description: use gpt-oss-120b (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Gpt Oss 20b Default
commands.description: use gpt-oss-20b (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Image Max Tokens
commands.description: maximum number of tokens each image can take, only used by vision models with dynamic resolution

commands.label: Image Min Tokens
commands.description: minimum number of tokens each image can take, only used by vision models with dynamic resolution

commands.label: Media Path
commands.description: directory for loading local media files; files can be accessed via file:// URLs using relative paths

commands.label: No Host
commands.description: bypass host buffer allowing extra buffers to be used

commands.label: Path
commands.description: path to serve static files from

commands.label: Perf
commands.description: whether to enable internal libllama performance timings

commands.label: Poll Batch
commands.description: use polling to wait for work

commands.label: Pooling
commands.description: pooling type for embeddings, use model default if unspecified

commands.label: Prefill Assistant
commands.description: whether to prefill the assistant's response if the last message is an assistant message when this flag is set, if the last message is an assistant message then it will be treated as a full message and not prefilled

commands.label: Prio Batch
commands.description: set process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime

commands.label: Props
commands.description: enable changing global properties via POST /props

commands.label: Rerank
commands.description: enable reranking endpoint on server

commands.label: Reuse Port
commands.description: allow multiple sockets to bind to the same port

commands.label: Skip Chat Parsing
commands.description: force a pure content parser, even if a Jinja template is specified; model will output everything in the content section, including any reasoning and/or tool calls

commands.label: Sleep Idle Seconds
commands.description: number of seconds of idleness after which the server will sleep

commands.label: Slot Save Path
commands.description: path to save slot kv cache

commands.label: Spm Infill
commands.description: use Suffix/Prefix/Middle pattern for infill (instead of Prefix/Suffix/Middle) as some models prefer this.

commands.label: Tags
commands.description: set model tags, comma-separated (informational, not used for routing)

commands.label: Threads Http
commands.description: number of threads used to process HTTP requests

commands.label: Tools
commands.description: experimental: whether to enable built-in tools for AI agents - do not enable in untrusted environments specify "all" to enable all tools available tools: read_file, file_glob_search, grep_search, exec_shell_command, write_file, edit_file, apply_diff, get_datetime

commands.label: Tts Use Guide Tokens
commands.description: Use guide tokens to improve TTS word recall

commands.label: Ui
commands.description: --no-ui whether to enable the Web UI

commands.label: Ui Config
commands.description: JSON that provides default UI settings (overrides UI defaults)

commands.label: Ui Config File
commands.description: JSON file that provides default UI settings (overrides UI defaults)

commands.label: Ui Mcp Proxy
commands.description: experimental: whether to enable MCP CORS proxy - do not enable in untrusted environments

commands.label: Vision Gemma 12b Default
commands.description: use Gemma 3 12B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Vision Gemma 4b Default
commands.description: use Gemma 3 4B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)

commands.label: Warmup
commands.description: whether to perform warmup with an empty run

commands.label: Webui
commands.description: [DEPRECATED: use --ui/--no-ui] whether to enable the Web UI

commands.label: Webui Config
commands.description: [DEPRECATED: use --ui-config] JSON that provides default WebUI settings (overrides WebUI defaults)

commands.label: Webui Config File
commands.description: [DEPRECATED: use --ui-config-file] JSON file that provides default WebUI settings (overrides WebUI defaults)

commands.label: Webui Mcp Proxy
commands.description: [DEPRECATED: use --ui-mcp-proxy/--no-ui-mcp-proxy] experimental: whether to enable MCP CORS proxy

commands.label: GPU Layers
commands.description: Max layers to store in VRAM ('auto', 'all', or number)

commands.label: Split Mode
commands.description: How to split model across multiple GPUs

commands.label: Main GPU
commands.description: Primary GPU index for the model

commands.label: Devices
commands.description: Comma-separated list of devices for offloading

commands.label: Tensor Split
commands.description: Fraction to offload to each GPU (e.g. 3,1)

commands.label: KV Cache Offload
commands.description: Enable KV cache offloading to GPU

commands.label: Op Offload
commands.description: Offload host tensor operations to device

commands.label: Auto Fit Memory
commands.description: Adjust arguments to fit in device memory

commands.label: CPU MoE
commands.description: Keep all MoE weights in CPU

commands.label: Fit Ctx
commands.description: minimum ctx size that can be set by --fit option,

commands.label: Fit Target
commands.description: target margin per device for --fit, comma-separated list of values, single value is broadcast across all devices,

commands.label: N Cpu Moe
commands.description: keep the Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights of the first N layers in the CPU

commands.label: KV Cache Type (K)
commands.description: KV cache data type for Keys

commands.label: KV Cache Type (V)
commands.description: KV cache data type for Values

commands.label: Weight Repacking
commands.description: Enable weight repacking for performance

commands.label: Temperature
commands.description: Sampling temperature (higher = more creative)

commands.label: Top-K
commands.description: Top-K sampling (0 = disabled)

commands.label: Top-P
commands.description: Top-P nucleus sampling (1.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Min-P
commands.description: Min-P sampling (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Seed
commands.description: RNG seed (-1 = random)

commands.label: Repeat Penalty
commands.description: Penalize repetition (1.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Repeat Last N
commands.description: Tokens to consider for repeat penalty (-1 = ctx)

commands.label: Presence Penalty
commands.description: Presence penalty (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Frequency Penalty
commands.description: Frequency penalty (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Dynamic Temp Range
commands.description: Dynamic temperature range (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: Dynamic Temp Exponent
commands.description: Dynamic temperature exponent

commands.label: Mirostat
commands.description: Mirostat sampling mode (0=off, 1=v1, 2=v2)

commands.label: Mirostat LR (eta)
commands.description: Mirostat learning rate

commands.label: Mirostat Entropy (tau)
commands.description: Mirostat target entropy

commands.label: XTC Probability
commands.description: XTC sampling probability (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: XTC Threshold
commands.description: XTC sampling threshold

commands.label: DRY Multiplier
commands.description: DRY sampling multiplier (0.0 = disabled)

commands.label: DRY Base
commands.description: DRY sampling base value

commands.label: Ignore EOS
commands.description: Ignore end-of-stream token and keep generating

commands.label: Sampler Pipeline
commands.description: Sampler order separated by ';'

commands.label: Grammar (BNF)
commands.description: BNF-like grammar to constrain output

commands.label: JSON Schema
commands.description: JSON schema to constrain output

commands.label: Dry Allowed Length
commands.description: set allowed length for DRY sampling

commands.label: Dry Penalty Last N
commands.description: set DRY penalty for the last n tokens

commands.label: Dry Sequence Breaker
commands.description: add sequence breaker for DRY sampling, clearing out default breakers ('\n', ':', '"', '*') in the process; use "none" to not use any sequence breakers

commands.label: Grammar File
commands.description: file to read grammar from

commands.label: Sampler Seq
commands.description: simplified sequence for samplers that will be used

commands.label: Top Nsigma
commands.description: top-n-sigma sampling

commands.label: Typical
commands.description: locally typical sampling, parameter p

commands.label: RoPE Scaling
commands.description: RoPE frequency scaling method

commands.label: RoPE Scale
commands.description: RoPE context scaling factor

commands.label: RoPE Freq Base
commands.description: RoPE base frequency for NTK-aware scaling

commands.label: RoPE Freq Scale
commands.description: RoPE frequency scaling factor (1/N)

commands.label: YaRN Original Context
commands.description: YaRN original context size (0 = model default)

commands.label: YaRN Ext Factor
commands.description: YaRN extrapolation mix factor (0.0 = full interpolation)

commands.label: YaRN Attn Factor
commands.description: YaRN attention magnitude scale

commands.label: YaRN Beta Slow
commands.description: YaRN high correction dim (alpha)

commands.label: YaRN Beta Fast
commands.description: YaRN low correction dim (beta)

commands.label: Server Port
commands.description: Port the server listens on

commands.label: Server Host
commands.description: Host address to bind

commands.label: Chat Template
commands.description: Custom Jinja chat template name or path

commands.label: System Prompt
commands.description: System prompt to use with model

commands.label: Use Jinja Templating
commands.description: Enable Jinja template engine for chat

commands.label: Reasoning Format
commands.description: Format for model reasoning output

commands.label: Reasoning Mode
commands.description: Enable reasoning/thinking in chat

commands.label: Reasoning Budget (tokens)
commands.description: Token budget for thinking (-1 = unlimited)

commands.label: Api Key
commands.description: API key to use for authentication, multiple keys can be provided as a comma-separated list

commands.label: Api Key File
commands.description: path to file containing API keys

commands.label: Api Prefix
commands.description: prefix path the server serves from, without the trailing slash

commands.label: Chat Template File
commands.description: set custom jinja chat template file if suffix/prefix are specified, template will be disabled only commonly used templates are accepted (unless --jinja is set before this flag): list of built-in templates: bailing, bailing-think, bailing2, chatglm3, chatglm4, chatml, command-r, deepseek, deepseek-ocr, deepseek2, deepseek3, exaone-moe, exaone3, exaone4, falcon3, gemma, gigachat, glmedge, gpt-oss, granite, granite-4.0, grok-2, hunyuan-dense, hunyuan-moe, hunyuan-ocr, kimi-k2, llama2, llama2-sys, llama2-sys-bos, llama2-sys-strip, llama3, llama4, megrez, minicpm, mistral-v1, mistral-v3, mistral-v3-tekken, mistral-v7, mistral-v7-tekken, monarch, openchat, orion, pangu-embedded, phi3, phi4, rwkv-world, seed_oss, smolvlm, solar-open, vicuna, vicuna-orca, yandex, zephyr

commands.label: Chat Template Kwargs
commands.description: sets additional params for the json template parser, must be a valid json object string, e.g. '{"key1":"value1","key2":"value2"}'

commands.label: Metrics
commands.description: enable prometheus compatible metrics endpoint

commands.label: Reasoning Budget Message
commands.description: message injected before the end-of-thinking tag when reasoning budget is exhausted

commands.label: Slots
commands.description: expose slots monitoring endpoint

commands.label: Ssl Cert File
commands.description: path to file a PEM-encoded SSL certificate

commands.label: Ssl Key File
commands.description: path to file a PEM-encoded SSL private key

commands.label: Disable Logging
commands.description: Disable log output entirely

commands.label: Log File
commands.description: Save log output to file

commands.label: Log Colors
commands.description: Colorize log output

commands.label: Verbose Mode
commands.description: Log all messages (useful for debugging)

commands.label: Verbosity Level
commands.description: 0=generic, 1=error, 2=warning, 3=info, 4=debug

commands.label: Log Prefix
commands.description: Enable prefix in log messages

commands.label: Log Timestamps
commands.description: Enable timestamps in log messages

commands.label: Offline Mode
commands.description: Force cache usage, prevent network access

commands.label: Speculative Type
commands.description: Comma-separated speculative decoding types

commands.label: Draft Model
commands.description: Draft model path for speculative decoding

commands.label: Draft GPU Layers
commands.description: Max draft model layers in VRAM

commands.label: Draft Max Tokens
commands.description: Tokens to draft for speculative decoding

commands.label: Draft Min Tokens
commands.description: Minimum draft tokens for speculative decoding

commands.label: Draft P-Min
commands.description: Minimum speculative decoding probability (greedy)

commands.label: Draft P-Split
commands.description: Speculative decoding split probability

commands.label: Spec Default
commands.description: enable default speculative decoding config

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Mask
commands.description: Draft model CPU affinity mask. Complements cpu-range-draft

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Mask Batch
commands.description: Draft model CPU affinity mask. Complements cpu-range-draft

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Moe
commands.description: keep all Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights in the CPU for the draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Range
commands.description: Ranges of CPUs for affinity. Complements --cpu-mask-draft

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Strict
commands.description: Use strict CPU placement for draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Cpu Strict Batch
commands.description: Use strict CPU placement for draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Device
commands.description: comma-separated list of devices to use for offloading the draft model (none = don't offload) use --list-devices to see a list of available devices

commands.label: Spec Draft Hf
commands.description: Same as --hf-repo, but for the draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft N Cpu Moe
commands.description: keep the Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights of the first N layers in the CPU for the draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Override Tensor
commands.description: override tensor buffer type for draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Poll
commands.description: Use polling to wait for draft model work

commands.label: Spec Draft Poll Batch
commands.description: Use polling to wait for draft model work

commands.label: Spec Draft Prio
commands.description: set draft process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime

commands.label: Spec Draft Prio Batch
commands.description: set draft process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime

commands.label: Spec Draft Threads
commands.description: number of threads to use during generation

commands.label: Spec Draft Threads Batch
commands.description: number of threads to use during batch and prompt processing

commands.label: Spec Draft Type K
commands.description: KV cache data type for K for the draft model

commands.label: Spec Draft Type V
commands.description: KV cache data type for V for the draft model

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K Min Hits
commands.description: minimum hits for ngram-map-k speculative decoding

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K Size M
commands.description: ngram size M for ngram-map-k speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K Size N
commands.description: ngram size N for ngram-map-k speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K4v Min Hits
commands.description: minimum hits for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K4v Size M
commands.description: ngram size M for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Map K4v Size N
commands.description: ngram size N for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Min Hits
commands.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-min-hits

commands.label: Spec Ngram Mod N Match
commands.description: ngram-mod lookup length

commands.label: Spec Ngram Mod N Max
commands.description: maximum number of ngram tokens to use for ngram-based speculative decoding

commands.label: Spec Ngram Mod N Min
commands.description: minimum number of ngram tokens to use for ngram-based speculative decoding

commands.label: Spec Ngram Simple Min Hits
commands.description: minimum hits for ngram-simple speculative decoding

commands.label: Spec Ngram Simple Size M
commands.description: ngram size M for ngram-simple speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Simple Size N
commands.description: ngram size N for ngram-simple speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram

commands.label: Spec Ngram Size M
commands.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-size-m

commands.label: Spec Ngram Size N
commands.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-size-n or --spec-ngram-mod-n-match
